steps.title: Prepare appropriate volume of thawing media...
steps.instruction: Prepare appropriate volume of thawing media (RPMI + 5% HS + 1% Pen/Strep + 1% Glutamine) and keep it at 4 °C .

steps.title: Prepare appropriate volume of wash media...
steps.instruction: Prepare appropriate volume of wash media (RPMI + 10% FBS + 1% Pen/Strep + 1% Glutamine) and and keep it at 4 °C .

steps.title: Prepare appropriate volume of fresh PBS + 0
steps.instruction: Prepare appropriate volume of fresh PBS + 0.04% BSA.

steps.title: Warm up thawing media, wash media and PBS + 0
steps.instruction: Warm up thawing media, wash media and PBS + 0.04% BSA in 37 °C water bath.

steps.title: Transfer 9 mL of 37 °C...
steps.instruction: Transfer 9 mL of 37 °C pre-warmed thawing media into each of the 15 mL Falcon tube.

steps.title: Take the cryovial containing PBMCs out...
steps.instruction: Take the cryovial containing PBMCs out of liquid nitrogen storage, place cryovial on dry ice, and transfer immediately to the 37 °C water bath. Thaw for 1 minute- 00:02:00 until no visible ice crystals remain.

steps.title: After thawing for 1 minute- 00:02:00...
steps.instruction: After thawing for 1 minute- 00:02:00 , open the cryovial in a biosafety cabinet and add 500 µL - 1 mL of pre-warmed thawing media into the cryovial using the 1 mL wide-bore blue tips.

steps.title: After adding the thawing media, use...
steps.instruction: After adding the thawing media, use the 1 mL wide-bore blue tips to gently transfer the whole suspension from the cryovial into the 15 mL Falcon tube containing 9 mL of pre-warmed thawing media.

steps.title: Mix the suspension extremely gently by...
steps.instruction: Mix the suspension extremely gently by inverting the Falcon tube twice.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 300 x g, 21 °C, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 300 x g, 21 °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Decant the supernatant
steps.instruction: Decant the supernatant.

steps.title: Leave around 200 µL of supernatant behind
steps.instruction: Leave around 200 µL of supernatant behind.

steps.title: Using a serological pipette, gently re-suspend...
steps.instruction: Using a serological pipette, gently re-suspend the cell pellet (3-5 times) in 5 mL of pre-warmed wash media.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 300 x g, 21 °C, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 300 x g, 21 °C, 5 minutes .

steps.title: Decant the supernatant
steps.instruction: Decant the supernatant. Leave around 200 µL of supernatant behind.

steps.title: Repeat Step 14-16
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 14-16. Centrifuge at 300 x g, 21 °C, 5 minutes . Decant the supernatant. Leave around 200 µL of supernatant behind. Using a serological pipette, gently re-suspend the cell pellet (7 times) in 3 mL of pre-warmed PBS + 0.04 % BSA. Avoid bubbles.

steps.title: After the second wash, centrifuge at...
steps.instruction: After the second wash, centrifuge at 300 x g, °C, for 00:05:00 at 21 °C . Decant the supernatant until around 200 µL of supernatant is left behind.

steps.title: Using a serological pipette, gently re-suspend...
steps.instruction: Using a serological pipette, gently re-suspend the cell pellet (7 times) in 3 mL of pre-warmed PBS + 0.04 % BSA. Avoid bubbles.

steps.title: Gently re-suspend the cells in 800...
steps.instruction: Gently re-suspend the cells in 800 µL of PBS + 0.04% BSA (pipette ~10 times).

steps.title: Filter the cell suspension through the...
steps.instruction: Filter the cell suspension through the 30 µm Macs SmartStrainer to remove clumps or debris. After filtering, keep cells On ice .

steps.title: Thoroughly mix 15 µL of cell...
steps.instruction: Thoroughly mix 15 µL of cell suspension with 15 µL of trypan blue. Load 10 µL of mixture into each of the two chambers of a cell counting slide.

steps.title: Let the samples sit in the...
steps.instruction: Let the samples sit in the cell counting slide for 00:01:00 before performing cell counting on an automated cell counter.

steps.title: Make aliquots of 1
steps.instruction: Make aliquots of 1.50 × 10 6 cells/mL for each sample ( 100 µL aliquot per sample).

steps.title: Keep the remaining cell suspension from...
steps.instruction: Keep the remaining cell suspension from individual samples On ice for DNA extraction using a QIAamp DNA Mini Kit (Qiagen, Cat no. 51306) according to the manufacturer’s protocol. Perform genotyping using Illumina Global Screening Array-24 v3.0 BeadChip (Cat. No.: 20030770).

steps.title: Mix equal volumes ( 80 µL...
steps.instruction: Mix equal volumes ( 80 µL ) of cell suspension from each sample (up to 16 samples) to make a pooled suspension with a final concentration of 1.50 × 10 6 cells/mL (total volume: 1280 µL). Keep this pooled suspension On ice .

steps.title: Thoroughly mix 15 µL of the...
steps.instruction: Thoroughly mix 15 µL of the pooled suspension with 15 µL of trypan blue. Load 10 µL of the mixture into each of the two chambers of a cell counting slide.

steps.title: Let the samples sit in the...
steps.instruction: Let the samples sit in the cell counting slide for 00:01:00 before performing cell counting on an automated cell counter.

steps.title: Count cells from the pooled suspension...
steps.instruction: Count cells from the pooled suspension using an automated cell counter and verify that the concentration is in the range of 1.10 x 10 6 cells/mL to 1.50 x 10 6 cells/mL.

steps.title: Proceed with single cell capturing
steps.instruction: Proceed with single cell capturing: Load 40,000 cells per 10x well using an appropriate 10x reagent kit for your application and run the 10x Genomics Chromium Controller according to the manufacturer’s protocol.
